reviews.title: Not Worth the Price
reviews.text:
I booked this hotel based on some reviews but the experience was underwhelming, to say the least.
1. The AC in the room was not working and after about an hour (past midnight) we were given another room after the technician declared that there was a fault. Our word was not enough. 
2. The bathroom was stinking and it was obvious that the cleaning was shoddy.
3. Items in the breakfast buffet ran out
4. The AC is centrally set at around 24°C, which is rather inadequate at daytime if the room faces west.  The thermostat in the room is dummy and only serves to increase your frustration because even if you repeatedly set it to 10°C (it actually goes down to that!) there is no change in the room temperature, which continues to stay at 24°c. So why not inform the guests of this beforehand itself!
5. Only one of the two lifts works. The other is supposedly under maintenance. 

All in all, one can get many better options in Pune at this price point. Best avoided

reviews.text:
I stayed here for a night, within which I got convinced, I will never pay this price for such a service. The location is decent, not far from city centre, about 4kms. The hotel had one person as a valet, gate keeper, security bag check and bell boy. This obviously hampered my check in speed. The room is clean and well furnished, with a nice bathroom. 
If you call something from room service be ready to wait for ablest 15 minutes and a call to follow up for you bottle of water. If you call for more than one thing to your room, the staff will get one thing at a time. My car was parked in the heat instead of the basement, to let it heat up. 
I may sound little anal, but if I'm paying that amount of money for a night without breakfast, I expect better service. There are ample options in the same line as this one for you to spend your money's worth.

reviews.title: 私たちの体験したいことを真摯にアテンドして下さる素敵なホテルでした。
reviews.text: 新婚旅行で行ったのですが、なんだかんだ居心地がよく、5日も滞在してしまいました。ホテルマンの真摯な対応、食事のスタッフの気持ちの良い給仕、掃除に来るスタッフの心遣い、どれをとってもとても満足できました。市街から離れてはいますが、オート力車で20分で行けるので、全然良かったです。ホテル周辺には大型ショッピングモールが3件あるので、買い物なら十分そこで満足出来ました。一人の背の高いホテルマンが私たちのあらゆる面のアテンドをしてくれました。日本人でも好感の持てるとても細やかな気配りの出来る方に大変お世話になりました。
reviews.positives: ホテルマンが素晴らしい。本来自分たちでする調整を私たちのためにしてくれました。旅慣れない私たちにとってとても良いパートナーになってくれました。

reviews.title: 최악이였습니다
reviews.text:
출장차 방문 (총 룸2개 예약)
일정변경으로 예약 취소를 하려하였으나 아고다측에서 연락시 나의 예약을 확인할수 없다며 담당자 연락을 미뤄 어쩔수없이 일정을 변경하고 투숙하게되었습니다 
(개인적으로 호텔에 연락시 내 예약건을 확인가능했음, 호텔측이 거짓말하는거 같았음) 
체크인을 하러갔더니 예약한 룸에 수도가 문제가 있다며 다른 호텔에 가서 하루 자고오라함. 
2개룸 전부..
밤 늦게 갑자기.. 선택의 여지가 없었음 
일방적인 호텔의 예약변경이고 이에대한 어떠한 보상도 받지 못함
메리아트 마일리지 적립을 체크인, 체크아웃시 요구하였으나 알겠다고만 하고 아직까지도 확인 불가능
룸서비스 시켜도 기본 한시간은 걸리고 
로비외 라운지도 없음 
시설은 둘째고 직원들의 서비스가 최악임 

방문했다가 일정이 변경되도 괜찮다면 
예약하세요 

저는 절대 재방문 없을껍니다 
호텔측에도 항의 하겠습니다
reviews.response:
Dear Guest,

Thank you for taking time out to review the hotel  services.

WE look forward to welcome you again.

Regards,

reviews.title: A heavenly stay filled with warmth, kindness, and unforgettable moments.
reviews.positives:
It was a truly special day for us, and I had requested the team at Four Points by Sheraton, Pune, to decorate our room. Honestly, I wasn’t expecting much — I thought communication gaps might lead to something simple. But the moment we arrived, we were welcomed with the warmest smiles, and everything changed.

When we opened the door to our room, it felt as if we had stepped into heaven. The housekeeping team had gone beyond imagination — every detail, every touch was filled with love and beauty. It wasn’t just decoration; it was emotion brought to life. It made our day even more memorable, and I’ll remain deeply grateful for this forever.

A heartfelt thanks to the entire housekeeping team. Despite it being Diwali, they still made time to surprise us with a lovely gift. And one of the kind ladies from the team even helped my wife drape her saree — an act of pure kindness that touched our hearts.

Well done, Sheraton. You truly have an amazing staff — not just skilled, but full of warmth, compassion, and humanity. Please take good care of them, for they are the reason your guests carry home not just memories, but feelings.
